name: Asian Vegetable Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sesame oil or chili oil
1 pound soba noodles, fettuccini, or ravioli, cooked according to package
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, garlic, and ginger root in a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole.
2. Microwave, uncovered, on high for 45 seconds.
3. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch with soy sauce and stir until smooth.
4. Add the soy sauce mixture to the garlic, ginger, orange juice, vinegar, and sherry. Mix well.
5. Microwave, uncovered, on high until boiling and slightly thickened, about 2-3 minutes, stirring after 1 minute.
6. Stir again after cooking until the sauce is smooth.
7. Add snow peas, mushrooms, and carrots. Cover tightly with a lid or plastic wrap turned back slightly on one side.
8. Microwave on high until vegetables are tender-crisp, about 3-4 minutes, stirring once.
9. Serve over cooked noodles or ravioli.
